title: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, October 06 2021
section_path: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, October 06 2021
section_path_text: Weekly Dry Time Charter Estimates, October 06 2021
summary:
Main
The capesize market is going from strength to strength supported by iron ore export volumesout of Brazil and Australia and China and strong mineral exports in the pacific. A lack of tonnage is also driving freight rates due to port congestion in China along with other Covid-related delays. A quiet week in the pacific for the kamsarmax/panamax sector with China on holiday but news of capesize cargoes being split on to panamax vessels has offered some support.
